phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fishmonger hall is
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh seafood is typically sold in dedicated ground-floor halls for ventilation.

likely_response.local: Fica na parte central do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NUH PAH-ruh-tih sayngt-RAHL DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: It is in the central part of the market.

responses.english: It is in the central part of the market.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NUH PAH-ruh-tih sayngt-RAHL DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Fica na parte central do mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Queijos da Serra stall is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a banca dos Queijos da Serra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH BAHNNG-kuh DOOSH KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Regional cheese vendors are usually positioned near central circulation areas.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Queijos da Serra ou pergunte ao queijeiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW kay-ZHAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for Queijos da Serra or ask the cheese vendor.

responses.english: Follow the signs for Queijos da Serra or ask the cheese vendor.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh KAY-zhoosh DUH SEH-ruh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW kay-ZHAY-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Queijos da Serra ou pergunte ao queijeiro.

phrases.cultural_note: Local markets often use shared weighing stations to verify weight before payment.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to weigh my produce
phrases.cultural_note: Weighing produce before checkout is standard practice to ensure fair trade.

likely_response.local: Na balança ao lado da Peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH buh-LAHNNG-suh OW LAH-doo DUH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the produce scale station, near the Fishmonger Hall.

responses.english: Go to the produce scale station, near the Fishmonger Hall.
responses.phonetic: NUH buh-LAHNNG-suh OW LAH-doo DUH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.french: Na balança ao lado da Peixaria.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria Central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Central Staircase.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Central Staircase.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Escadaria Central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the central staircase is
phrases.cultural_note: Central stairs connect the fresh produce floor to the upstairs dining area.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Escadaria Central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Central Staircase.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Central Staircase.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shkuh-duh-REEUH sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Escadaria Central.

phrases.text_local: Pode indicar-me onde fica a Peixaria?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR-MIH OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pay-shuh-REEUH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fishmonger hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fishmonger hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Peixaria.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de frutos secos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH FROO-toosh SEH-koosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Balcão de Frutos Secos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH FROO-toosh SEH-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Dried Fruit Counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Dried Fruit Counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH FROO-toosh SEH-koosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Balcão de Frutos Secos.
